hypothesis: If the o4-mini model with one-shot prompting using the most complex in-context example is used to extract PROV-DM‑compliant synthesis procedures from scientific papers, then, on the test set, it will achieve higher collection rate and higher structural-level and parametric-level precision, recall, and F1 scores than GPT-4.1 mini or GPT-4.1 across zero-shot and simpler prompting configurations.
